'''OR-5''' was a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] in the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factory on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. OR-5 was destroyed when [[HK-47]] tricked a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] into reactivating the factory.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}}
